prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UT10G1MMFCSCRHAC Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool 10g 1mm Flux Coated Solder Computer Repairs Hobbies And Crafts Description: The Universal Tool Solder with Flux is ideal for jewelry making and repair, crafts, hobbies and much more. Featuring a 1mm solder that weighs in at 10 grams, you'll be able to fix up that project you've been putting off.

The solder is flux coated, which will keep whatever you're working on clean. It is also lead free. Stored in a convenient tube, you'll be able to keep your solder contained and out of harm's way.

Make sure to keep one of these in your hobby or crafting kit. Search Terms: solder flux craft hobby electrician soldering torch iron tips flux home improvement DIY skills self help solder flux craft hobby electrician soldering torch iron tips flux Features: - Solder Diameter: 1mm - Solder Weight: 10 grams - Flux Coated, Lead Free - Great for Soldering, Electricians, Computer Repairs, Crafts, Hobbies, etc. - WARNING: This product can expose you to chemicals including Lead and Lead Compounds, which is known to the state of California to cause cancer and birth defects or other reproductive harm. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10g 1mm Flux Coated Solder Lead Free

anthropic.title_differentiation: 1Mm Diameter, Flux Coated, Lead Free, Soldering Iron, Computer Repairs, Jewelry, Crafts

openai.title_differentiation: Flux Coated, Lead Free, Jewelry Repair, Computer Repairs, Crafts, Hobbies, 1Mm Diameter, 10 Gram Tube
